nasb.text: Only the high places were not taken away; the people still sacrificed and burned incense on the high places.

esv.text: Nevertheless, the high places were not taken away. The people still sacrificed and made offerings on the high places.

cnv.text: 只是邱壇還沒有廢去，人民仍在邱壇獻祭焚香。

ccb.text: 然而，他没有拆除丘坛，人们仍在那里献祭烧香。
